attributes.action: Get Chelsea sold, and release the UK sanctions on Roman Abramovic, BlueCo Out
attributes.additional_details: The fans are tired, the owners are killing the club, Roman was the heart of the club and he wanted us to win, he didn't care about the money he cared about the club, the current owners have killed the heart and soul of the club, please force these owners to sell
attributes.background: Chelsea need to be sold, and the sanctions on roman abramovich need to be lifted because the current owners are killing the club and the fans are tired after 4 years.
